mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName FROM maintenance_record mr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON mr.relic_id = cr.id WHERE mr.id = #{id}
SELECT mr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName FROM maintenance_record mr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON mr.relic_id = cr.id ORDER BY mr.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance_record (relic_id, maintenance_type, maintenance_date, maintenance_content, maintainer, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{relicId}, #{maintenanceType}, #{maintenanceDate}, #{maintenanceContent}, #{maintainer}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
